title: Travel Alerts
description: Sample alerts feed for advisories, disruptions and warnings. Admins: edit this file to publish a live alert.

items.title: Sample alert: check for seasonal SNCB engineering works
items.summary: SNCB periodically runs weekend engineering works affecting specific lines. This is a sample entry — replace with a live advisory when relevant.

items.title: Sample alert: verify current customs allowances before travel
items.summary: Duty-free allowances can change; always check the Belgian customs website close to your travel date. This is a sample placeholder entry.
